affected_pattern: Dual-homed billing record collection produced duplicate records in Africa-region accounts
root_cause: Dual-homed billing record forwarding — both primary and standby mediation paths were active simultaneously after a regional network change, and the billing record router forwarded to both, doubling the events delivered to rating.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Dual-Homed Mediation pattern
Network change NC-8172 set primary=active AND standby=active on billing record router
Rating input topic message count exactly 2x the network element emission count
recommended_action: Reset billing record router to active/standby mode (one active path only)
Deduplicate rating input for the overlap window by (IMSI, timestamp, cdr_id)
Reverse duplicated charges on affected customer invoices
Add a continuous check on billing record source-to-rating count ratio; alert if > 1.05
